aliases.note: ABA2 is ABA biosynthesis enzyme; no ABA2 node in KB - map to ABA hormone as functional proxy.
ABI4_5 composite (ABI4+ABI5); ABI4 is canonical representative ABA-responsive TF in KB.
ACS (1-aminocyclopropane-1-carboxylate synthase, ethylene biosynthesis) has no family member in KB; 'lacs' entries are LACS (lipid) not ACS.
AGG3 is heterotrimeric G-protein gamma subunit; KB has GBETAGAMMA1 (Gbeta/gamma complex) as closest family representative.
AHK3 is cytokinin histidine kinase receptor; KB has AHK (Arabidopsis Histidine Kinase) family node.
ANR1 is a nitrate-responsive MADS-box TF regulating lateral root growth; no ANR1 or MADS family node in KB - map to NITRATE signal as functional proxy.
AP2_TOE composite (AP2 + TOE1/2/3 miR172 targets); TOE1 is canonical representative.
ARF6_7_8 composite (auxin response factors 6/7/8); ARF6 is canonical representative in KB.
ARR_B = type-B Arabidopsis Response Regulators (transcriptional activators); ARR1 is canonical type-B representative in KB.
AUT_SYN is FLASH-P composite for autonomous flowering pathway; KB has 'Autonomous pathway' node.
AUX_IAA composite (Aux/IAA transcriptional repressors); IAA in KB represents the family.
BAK1 = ATBAK1 in KB (BRI1-Associated Receptor Kinase 1) with species prefix.
BPC1 = ATBPC1 in KB (Basic Pentacysteine 1) with species prefix.
BZR is the BZR family; BZR1 is canonical brassinosteroid TF representative in KB.
BZR_BES composite (BZR1 + BES1/BZR2 BR-regulated TFs); BZR1 is canonical representative in KB.
CCD8 is carotenoid cleavage dioxygenase 8 (SL biosynthesis); CCD7 is its paralog and only CCD family member in KB.
CKX3 is cytokinin oxidase/dehydrogenase 3; KB has CKX family node.
CKX5 is cytokinin oxidase/dehydrogenase 5; KB has CKX family node.
COP1_SPA composite (COP1 + SPA E3 ligase complex); COP1 is canonical representative in KB.
Cold_Vernalization = cold-induced vernalization signal; KB has 'vernalization' node.
D27 is DWARF27 beta-carotene isomerase (SL biosynthesis); no D27 node in KB - map to Strigolactone hormone as mechanism proxy.
DAO1 (Dioxygenase for Auxin Oxidation 1) oxidises IAA; KB has no DAO family - GH3 is closest functional node for IAA catabolism/inactivation.
EC = Evening Complex (ELF3+ELF4+LUX); ELF3 is scaffolding core and canonical representative in KB.
ELF3_EC composite (ELF3 within Evening Complex); ELF3 exact match in KB.
ETR1 = ATETR1 in KB (Ethylene Receptor 1) with species prefix.
FHY1 (Far-red elongated Hypocotyl 1) has no exact KB node; FHY3 is closest family member (both phyA signaling).
FIE (Fertilization-Independent Endosperm) is a PRC2 WD40 partner of MEDEA; no FIE node in KB - map to MEDEA (same FIS-PRC2 complex).
FIS2 is Fertilization-Independent Seed 2 (PRC2 subunit); KB has FIS family node.
FKF1 (Flavin-binding Kelch F-box 1) forms a complex with GI to degrade CDFs and promote CO/FT; no FKF family in KB - map to GI as functional partner.
FLOWER_INT is FLASH-P composite for flowering integrators (FT/SOC1/LFY); FT is canonical florigen representative in KB.
FRI (FRIGIDA) functions as part of the FRI complex; KB has FRI_COMPLEX as the nearest representative.
FVE (MSI4) is an autonomous-pathway flowering repressor of FLC; no FVE/MSI4 in KB - map to FCA (same autonomous pathway).
GA3OX is the GA3-oxidase family (GA biosynthesis); ATGA3OX1 is KB representative.
GA3OX1 = ATGA3OX1 in KB (GA3ox1, GA biosynthesis) with species prefix.
GA4 is bioactive gibberellin species; KB has GA as the hormone node (treatment analog).
GATA23 is a lateral-root-inducing GATA TF; KB has GATA family node.
GID1 is the GA receptor that promotes DELLA (GAI) degradation; no GID1 in KB - map to GAI as the immediate functional partner in GA signaling.
GIF1 = AN3 (ANGUSTIFOLIA3) - same gene, different name. Exact KB match under AN3.
GPA1 is the sole Arabidopsis G-alpha; no Galpha/GPA node in KB - map to GBETA (partner subunit of the heterotrimeric G-protein complex).
GRF is Growth-Regulating Factor family; ATGRF1 is KB representative.
HB21 (HD-Zip class I TF, branching regulator downstream of BRC1) has no HB family member in KB.
HSFA1D = ATHSFA1D in KB (Heat Shock Factor A1D) with species prefix.
IPT5 is Isopentenyltransferase 5 (cytokinin biosynthesis); KB has IPT family node.
KLUH = KLU (CYP78A5) - same gene, shorter KB label.
LD (LUMINIDEPENDENS) has no KB node; FLD (Flowering Locus D) is closest autonomous-pathway FLC repressor in KB.
LDL1 (LSD1-LIKE 1) is an FLD paralog - both LSD1-family H3K4 demethylases in autonomous flowering pathway. KB has FLD.
LEC1 = ATLEC1 in KB (Leafy Cotyledon 1) with species prefix.
LEC2 = ATLEC2 in KB (Leafy Cotyledon 2) with species prefix.
Low_Nitrate is the environmental low-nitrate signal; KB has NITRATE node as the nitrate-availability signal.
Low_Phosphate is the environmental low-phosphate signal; KB has 'Phosphate Starvation' as the matching stimulus node.
MAX3 (= CCD7) is SL biosynthesis; no MAX3 in KB - MAX1 is the nearest SL-biosynthesis MAX family member present.
MAX4 (= CCD8) is SL biosynthesis; no MAX4 in KB - MAX1 is the nearest SL-biosynthesis MAX family member present.
MEA = MEDEA (PRC2 SET-domain component); KB uses full name MEDEA.
MSI1 = ATMSI1 in KB (Multicopy Suppressor of IRA 1) with species prefix.
NCED3 (ABA biosynthesis 9-cis-epoxycarotenoid dioxygenase) has no Arabidopsis NCED3 in KB; BNNCED3 (Brassica napus NCED3 orthologue) is the only NCED family representative.
NLP7 is the master nitrate-responsive TF; no NLP family in KB - map to NITRATE signal as functional proxy.
PAR1 (Phytochrome Rapidly Regulated 1, HLH shade-avoidance); KB has PAR family node.
PIF4_5_7 composite (thermo/shade-avoidance bHLH PIFs); PIF4 is canonical representative in KB.
PLT composite (PLETHORA family, lateral-root/meristem AP2 TFs); KB has 'plt3plt5plt7 triple ' as only PLT representative (triple-mutant descriptor used as family node).
PYL is the PYR/PYL ABA receptor family; PYL8 is the KB representative.
RAV1 = ATRAV1 in KB (Related to ABI3/VP1 1) with species prefix.
SEEDSTICK = STK = AGL11 - same gene; KB uses AGL11.
SLY1 is the F-box that targets DELLA (GAI/RGA) for degradation in GA signaling; no SLY1 in KB - map to GAI as direct target in the same pathway.
SL_SYN is FLASH-P composite for SL biosynthesis; map to Strigolactone hormone node (product of pathway).
SNRK2 is the ABA-activated SnRK2 kinase family; KB has no SnRK2 - SnRK1 is the closest paralogous family kinase.
SOB7 is Suppressor Of phyB-4 7 (AHL22-like); SOB3 is nearest SOB/AHL family member in KB.
TAR1 (Tryptophan Aminotransferase Related 1) is a TAA1 paralog in the TAA/TAR auxin biosynthesis family; TAA1 is KB representative.
TAR2 = ATTAR2 in KB with species prefix (Tryptophan Aminotransferase Related 2).
TCP14 = BPTCP14 in KB (Betula platyphylla TCP14 orthologue) - only TCP14 representative present.
TIE1 (TCP Interactor containing EAR motif 1) binds and represses TCP transcription factors (incl. TCP14); no TIE1 in KB - map to BPTCP14 (its direct target and pathway proxy).
TPS1 is Trehalose Phosphate Synthase 1 producing T6P (sugar signal); KB has no TPS or T6P/trehalose-related node.
UVR8 = ATUVR8 in KB (UV Resistance Locus 8, UV-B photoreceptor) with species prefix.
VAL1 (VP1/ABI3-Like 1, HSI2-related B3 repressor silencing FLC) has no VAL/HSI2 family node in KB.
VAL2 (VP1/ABI3-Like 2) has no VAL/HSI2 family node in KB.
VIN3 (Vernalization Insensitive 3, PHD finger) is the cold-induced FLC repressor; no VIN3 in KB - map to 'vernalization' signal as the pathway it transduces.
Warm_Temperature is FLASH-P environmental signal; KB has 'TEMPERATURE' as the ambient-temperature node.
YUC10 is YUCCA10 (flavin monooxygenase, auxin biosynthesis); KB has YUC family node.
YUC11 is YUCCA11 (auxin biosynthesis); KB has YUC family node.
YUC8 is YUCCA8 (auxin biosynthesis); KB has YUC family node.
ZTL (Zeitlupe, blue-light F-box) - KB has NAZTL (Nicotiana attenuata ZTL orthologue) as only ZTL family representative.
